faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Douglaston?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Douglaston typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the location and size of the hive, accessibility, and complexity of the removal. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Douglaston home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day bee removal service in Douglaston for most situations. Once you contact us, we'll schedule a convenient time to assess the situation and safely remove the bees, typically completing the job within a few hours depending on hive size and location.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation to preserve these important pollinators. Our technicians work with local beekeepers to relocate honey bee colonies safely. However, in cases involving aggressive species or severe infestations where relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted extermination methods as a last resort.
